quickFacts.consensus: 50/50 Proof of Work / Proof of Stake hybrid
quickFacts.smartContracts: No — DeFi is protocol-level, not smart contract based
quickFacts.multiChain: PBaaS — Public Blockchains as a Service
quickFacts.transactionFees: 0.0001 VRSC per transaction (fractions of a cent)
